scripts.dev:cloudflare: npm run build && npm run wrangler -- pages dev dist --compatibility-date=2026-05-13
scripts.lint: node --check main.js && node --check workers/approval-email-worker.js && node scripts/validate-site.mjs
scripts.build: npm run lint && npm run build:static
scripts.preview:cloudflare: npm run build && npm run wrangler -- pages deploy dist --project-name portfolio --branch portfolio-refresh-preview
scripts.deploy:production: npm run build && npm run wrangler -- pages deploy dist --project-name portfolio --branch prod
